overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit medieval-style stone corridor with wooden beams and torch lighting. The player walks through the hallway, examines the surroundings including bookshelves and a desk with a CRT monitor, turns around at the end near a wooden bench, and ascends a stone staircase to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with wooden ceiling beams and torch lighting

events.description: passing the wooden desk with CRT monitor on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor, passing wooden bookshelves and a desk with an old CRT monitor

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall forming the corridor sides
heavy wooden ceiling beams supporting the roof
lit torch providing warm flickering light
tall wooden bookshelf with books and items
wooden desk with papers and objects
old CRT monitor sitting on the desk
ornate circular rug on the wooden floor
wooden bench against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking down a narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Wooden ceiling beams run overhead, and a wooden bookshelf lines the left wall while a desk with an old CRT monitor sits on the right. The camera moves forward over an ornate circular rug toward a wooden bench at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor end with wooden bench and door

events.description: approaching the wooden bench and door at the end of the corridor
turning around to face back down the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the corridor, examining the wooden bench and door, then turning around to survey the room

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron handle on the left wall
framed painting hanging on the stone wall above the bench

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the end of the corridor where a wooden bench sits beneath a framed painting, with a heavy wooden door to the left. After briefly examining this area, the camera turns around 180 degrees to face back down the hall, causing the bookshelf to shift from the left to the right side of the frame as the perspective reverses.

scene_state.functional_zone: main corridor returning toward entrance area

events.description: approaching the doorway leading to the stone staircase on the right

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor toward the staircase doorway, passing the circular rug again

entered.detail: open doorway revealing stone stairs ascending to the right

segments.scene_description: Moving back down the corridor, the camera approaches the circular rug from the opposite direction. The wooden bookshelf is now on the left side as the camera advances toward a doorway on the right that reveals a stone staircase ascending upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairwell ascending to upper level

events.description: entering the stone stairwell and beginning ascent
reaching the top landing and approaching the wooden door

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs in the narrow stone stairwell, approaching the upper door

entered.detail: wooden staircase ascending between stone walls
wooden door at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow stone stairwell and ascends the wooden stairs, leaving the main corridor behind. Torchlight illuminates the rough stone walls on either side as the camera climbs toward a wooden door at the top landing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a torch-lit medieval corridor that eventually leads upward into a narrow stone stairwell. It begins by moving down a narrow hallway beneath wooden beams, passing a bookshelf and a desk with a CRT monitor while gliding over an ornate circular rug. As the camera reaches a wooden bench and a framed painting at the far end, it performs a full 180-degree turn, reversing the perspective so the bookshelf shifts across the frame. The scene then retreats back down the corridor toward the rug before turning right into an open doorway. Finally, the camera ascends a set of wooden stairs, climbing between rough stone walls toward a wooden door at the top landing.
